summary: A cranky old audience tape that nonetheless delivers a standout Dark Star performance.
review: Both reviewers highlight the Dark Star as a major draw, calling it one of the most interesting and compelling versions ever heard. The recording is noted as an aging audience source – “cranky” and not pristine – but still worth listening to for the music. Conflicting star ratings (3‑5) reflect mixed feelings about sound quality versus performance merit.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong praise for Dark Star boosts the show rating, but two brief reviews and mentions of a low‑fidelity audience source keep overall confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a "cranky old recording" – an audience tape with noticeable age and limited clarity, yet the Dark Star remains audible.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set pacing; focus is solely on the extended Dark Star jam.
